problem id: 1282c5c5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11110000 -> 10001111
  11000111 -> 11111100
  00101000 -> 11101011
  10100010 -> 11101110
  11000100 -> 00011101
  01001010 -> 10011110
  10001110 -> 01111000
  00010011 -> 00010111

query: 01101110
predicted answer: 00001110
